content: I worked for Arjun for 4 years. I handled his phone, calendar, and financial apps. On October 15th, I left work at 6 PM. I was at home all night. I did not access his phone after 9 PM. I did not make any transfers. I have no idea about the ₹25 lakh. I don’t know who killed him. I didn’t talk to Vikram in October. My phone was lost last week — maybe someone stole it. I was scared after the murder, so I went to Goa to visit my sister. I didn’t run away. I just needed space.
